reviews.comment:
El sector de despacho combustible es de muy buena atención. Ahora la confitería muy mala.atencion y una falta de generosidad, cortesía y predisposición de las señoritas

(Translated by Google)
The fuel service department offers very good service. However, the confectionery department offers very poor service and a lack of generosity, courtesy, and helpfulness from the ladies.

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente me tuve que retirar sin poder cargar combustible. Primero porque no tienen todos los combustibles en cada isla, me solicitaron que me cambie de isla y cuando me tenían que cargar priorizaron la carga de la grúa del lugar, q llego dsp q yo, porque el chofer lo decidió y el chico de la playa no pudo hacer nada. Por lo tanto me retire del lugar sin ser atendido. Además  la grúa se estacionó en contramano del circuito normal de carga. Aparentemente el Sr. Chofer hace lo q quiere en el ACA San Luis.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, I had to leave without being able to refuel. First, because they don't have all the fuel options on each island, they asked me to change islands, and when they had to refuel, they prioritized the local tow truck, which arrived after me because the driver decided to do so, and the beach attendant couldn't do anything. Therefore, I left the area without being assisted. Furthermore, the tow truck parked in the wrong direction from the normal loading lane. Apparently, the driver does whatever he wants at the San Luis ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCOV9IRHFBRRAB
